# Big Data Energy

> Freelance AI consultancy led by Natasha Norsker — helping businesses leverage AI and data science from idea to implementation. Based in Copenhagen, Denmark, serving clients worldwide.

## About

- [Homepage](https://bigdataenergy.tech/)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/natashanorsker/)

Natasha Norsker is a freelance data scientist and ML engineer with a degree in AI & Data from DTU (Technical University of Denmark), 6+ years of hands-on experience, and a track record of delivering real-world AI impact across industries. Certified Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer. Founder of Women in AI Denmark.

## Services

- Freelance Data Scientist: Embedded ML expertise in your team — modelling, evaluation, deployment
- AI Use Case Validation & Discovery: Structured workshops to identify and prioritize valuable AI opportunities
- Public Speaking & Keynotes: Talks on applied AI, generative models, women in tech, and digital innovation (audiences of 20 to 650+)
- Workshops & Training: Hands-on sessions for teams and leaders, from 2-hour intros to full-day deep dives
- End-to-End AI Solutions: Full-cycle AI development — scoping, modelling, deployment, handover
- Full-Stack Development: Web apps, APIs, and deployment pipelines for data and AI workflows
